title: Loop-A asset-blind proposals can't be audited directly via run_proposal (load fails before asset injection)
source: B0085 re-run batch 2026-05-30: 6 early T-series proposals (T002/T003/T004/T006/T008R1/T007R1) crash with TypeError Proposal.__init__() missing 'asset' when run_proposal is invoked directly.
why: Loop-A hypothesizer proposals omit `asset` by design (asset-blind firewall). scripts/loop_a_tick.stage_review injects `asset` from current_tick state before constructing the Proposal, but a DIRECT/batch `python -m phase5.run_proposal --proposal <file>` calls load_proposal first, and BacklogEntry... i.e. Proposal requires `asset` as a positional arg, so it raises at construction before the B0040 redundant injection in run_preflight ever runs. These proposals are thus uncauditable outside the live Loop-A tick path.
value_rationale: Medium: blocks direct/batch re-auditing of asset-blind proposals (survivor-hunt sweeps, reproducibility). Not a survivor-bearing bug (0 survivors in the 2026-05-30 sweep) but a real audit-path gap.
scope: Option A: in phase5.run_proposal, infer `asset` from the proposal id/filename (e.g. 20260526-XAUUSD-... -> XAUUSD) or add a --asset CLI flag, injecting before load_proposal builds the Proposal.
Option B: make `asset` optional in the Proposal dataclass with a deferred-validation step, so load succeeds and the existing B0040 injection net fills it.
Option C: a small backfill script that stamps `asset` into the frozen early T-series proposal JSONs from their id prefix.
recommendation: Option A (id-prefix inference + --asset flag) is the durable, firewall-clean fix; Option C unblocks the frozen 6 immediately.

history.reason: chore(loop-a): B0085 re-run sweep â€” 44 built-in audits, 0 survivors

Fixed (Option A): added _infer_asset_from_path() to run_proposal.py — infers asset from the filename second component (e.g. 20260526-XAUUSD-... → XAUUSD). load_proposal() gains asset_override kwarg that injects only when asset is absent from the JSON (no-op on stamped proposals). run() auto-infers from filename; main() gains --asset CLI flag for manual override. 16 new tests, full suite 1131 pass.
fix(phase5): B0107 â€” asset injection for asset-blind proposals in run_proposal
